## 🐛 Description
A clear and concise description of the bug or feature request.

2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior
What did you expect to happen?

- OS: [e.g. Windows, macOS]
- Python Version: [e.g. 3.11]
- DB Type: [e.g. SQLite, PostgreSQL]
